name: TE Connectivity Ltd.
description: TE Connectivity Ltd. is a global industrial technology leader that designs and manufactures a broad portfolio of connectivity and sensor solutions. The company serves a diverse range of industries, including automotive, aerospace, defense, medical, and energy. By providing reliable and rugged electronic components, TE enables engineers to develop innovative solutions for data, power, and signal connectivity. Headquartered in Switzerland, the company is committed to creating a safer, sustainable, productive, and connected future through its advanced engineering and manufacturing capabilities, empowering technological transformation across the globe.
